name: DoIP_SetMulticastScopeId
title: DoIP_SetMulticastScopeId
description: Sets an IPv6 address scope ID for multicast requests, sent by a tester. The scope ID is equal to an adapter index of the tester node. See ipGetAdapter functions for more information.
The function allows to select an appropriate adapter for IPv6 multicast address, to be able, for example, to send multicast requests with a given VLAN tag.

parameters.name: scopeId
parameters.description: Scope ID for selection of a network adapter for IPv6 multicast requests.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
